author: Midwest-AI-Solutions
title: Naive str.replace in _build_cluster_meta corrupts cluster descriptions
notes: The str.replace global substitution bug is real and correctly identified at plan_order.py:162. However, practical impact is low: cluster descriptions are generated from templates (cluster_strategy.py:generate_description) that embed only the count number — no other digits to corrupt. The hypothetical examples (112→88) don't match actual generated descriptions. Still a valid code quality issue — str.replace is wrong for count patching.
